title: salvia muratae
intro: Salvia muratae is a species of plant in the genus Salvia, commonly known as sage, which is a flowering plant native to Mexico. The medicinal properties of Salvia muratae are attributed to its essential oils, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Salvia muratae include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cognitive function, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Salvia muratae can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are often used to support mental clarity and relaxation.
